page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 8.0 GB of x86_64 system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB per core allocation. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a divergence between single-core and multi-core execution. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores, fall within the average range. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, register in the lower tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both small and large blocks show weak throughput, and database operations or Redis SET operations also perform in the bottom quartile. Conversely, static web serving throughput and small-model LLM inference speeds maintain average performance.

Given its 1:2 CPU-to-memory ratio, the ecs.c7t.xlarge offers a qualitative balance for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. It is suited for single-threaded processing, basic web serving, and lightweight text or cryptographic operations. However, the lack of local storage and lower multi-core scaling make it less suitable for heavy database operations, parallelized compilation, or memory-intensive data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, this x86_64 architecture server lacks local storage and GPUs, relying on a 3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals average single-core CPU performance, static web serving, and small-model LLM inference, while multi-core execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall into the lower performance tier. This hardware profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for lightweight, compute-bound tasks that do not demand high memory density or local disk I/O. It is best suited for single-threaded applications, basic web serving, and simple cryptographic or text processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, suited for single-threaded tasks and basic web serving.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon processors, designed for single-threaded workloads and lightweight web serving without local storage.

8.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU resources
Average single-core CPU, static web serving, and small-model LLM inference performance
Lower-tier multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth capabilities
